bead.title: Add helix-system bead kinds and queue injection API
bead.description:
PROBLEM: There is no way to enqueue review-finding or alignment-review work as first-class tracker beads. Today review/alignment runs as post-cycle hooks invoked directly by the HELIX driver, bypassing the ready queue, scheduler, and standard evidence bundle. Without a typed bead kind and an injection entry point, execute-loop cannot treat them as ordinary work units.

ROOT CAUSE: internal/tracker/kinds.go:1 — bead-kind enum only covers human-authored kinds (feature, story, task); no `review-finding` or `alignment-review` kind exists. internal/tracker/queue.go:1 — Queue exposes Pop/Push for the loop but no programmatic Inject(parent, kind, payload) used by HELIX itself. internal/helix/exec/loop.go:1 — execute-loop dispatch table has no handler that produces the canonical evidence bundle for these kinds.

PROPOSED FIX: (a) Add `BeadKindReviewFinding` and `BeadKindAlignmentReview` to the kind enum with validation rules (parent must be the bead under review/align; payload schema documented). (b) Add `tracker.Inject(ctx, parent, kind, payload) (BeadID, error)` that creates the bead in state `ready`, idempotent on (parent, kind, payload-hash). (c) Add execute-loop dispatchers `runReviewFinding` and `runAlignmentReview` that invoke the existing review/align engines but write results through the standard evidence-bundle writer so downstream artifacts (logs, diffs, attestations) match other bead executions.

NON-SCOPE: HELIX driver wiring (covered by children 2 and 3). Removing the legacy hook code path (left until children 2 and 3 land so execute-loop has a fallback). UI/tracker dashboard rendering of the new kinds. Inherits all parent non-scope items. Governing artifact: parent helix-e26584d7. Depends on: helix-e26584d7 (parent only).

---
Mirrored from helix-30fcadf3 on 2026-05-20 per cleanup decision: HELIX repo PRD non-goals exclude tracker/queue/execution-engine implementation. Original description below is from the pre-collapse helix-cli era and references paths that no longer exist (scripts/helix, internal/helix/, tests/helix-cli.sh) or pre-collapse modules. DDx maintainers should reinterpret against current DDx surface before acting on it.
bead.acceptance:
AC1 TestBeadKindRegistration — review-finding and alignment-review kinds register, validate required parent reference, and reject payloads missing schema fields.
AC2 TestInjectQueueBeadIdempotent — tracker.Inject creates a ready bead, second call with identical (parent, kind, payload-hash) returns the same BeadID without duplicate insert.
AC3 TestExecuteLoopDispatchEvidenceBundle — execute-loop pops a review-finding bead and an alignment-review bead, dispatches to the new handlers, and the produced evidence bundle path/structure matches the bundle produced for ordinary beads (same manifest keys, same attestation envelope).
AC4 Gates — `go test ./internal/tracker/... ./internal/helix/exec/...` passes; `lefthook run pre-commit` passes; `go vet ./...` clean.
